# Clippy Warning Inventory — 2026-04-28
# Generated by: cargo clippy --workspace in src/compiler_rust/

## Summary
Total warnings: 4 (across 2 crates)
- simple-runtime (lib): 1 warning
- simple-compiler (lib): 3 warnings (2 auto-fixable)

## Warning 1 — clashing_extern_declarations
Crate: simple-runtime
File: runtime/src/value/cli_ffi.rs:268
Warning: `rt_cli_run_file_extern` redeclares `rt_cli_run_file` with a different signature
Rule: #[warn(clashing_extern_declarations)]
Fix: Update function signature in cli_ffi.rs to match generated runtime_symbol_entries.rs,
     or rename the extern fn to avoid the clash.

## Warning 2 — suspicious_open_options
Crate: simple-compiler
File: compiler/src/interpreter/../interpreter_extern/file_io.rs:396
Warning: file opened with `create`, but `truncate` behavior not defined
Rule: #[warn(clippy::suspicious_open_options)]
Fix: Add `.truncate(true)` or `.truncate(false)` or `.append(true)` after `.create(true)`

## Warning 3 — needless_lifetimes
Crate: simple-compiler
File: compiler/src/pipeline/module_loader.rs:336
Warning: explicit lifetimes could be elided: 'a
Rule: #[warn(clippy::needless_lifetimes)]
Fix: Remove explicit 'a lifetime annotation from fn source_snippet_for_span

## Warning 4 — needless_lifetimes
Crate: simple-compiler
File: compiler/src/pipeline/codegen.rs:154
Warning: explicit lifetimes could be elided: 'a
Rule: #[warn(clippy::needless_lifetimes)]
Fix: Remove explicit 'a lifetime annotation from fn vhdl_entity_table

The state file mentioned 7 warnings in simple-driver + 1 in simple-native-all.
Current run shows 1 warning in simple-runtime + 3 in simple-compiler.
